core_mechanism: commensurability-driven oscillatory response: as a confining length scale is varied, a system's average properties deviate from bulk behavior in a periodic (in-phase, paired) fashion governed by whether that length is commensurate with an integer number of discrete packed layers, i.e. geometric packing frustration between an intrinsic periodicity and a boundary constraint
brief_reason: The abstract reports that in-phase oscillatory deviations in excess entropy and self-diffusivity appear as a function of gap size and attributes them to geometric packing frustration when the confined space cannot accommodate an integer number of particle layers.
